text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're on our way home from a day out, and I'm
hoping to get back early enough to prepare for
tomorrow's training. However...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Munch... Munch... Mmm! No cap, this is the best!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That chunky beef burger was crazy! They
couldn't even fit it in the bun!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What should we eat next? Kilimanjaro fries? Or
how about the jumbo apple pie?
choice_data_list: I was thinking we should head home soon.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? But we're just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! You said eating like this is fine
every once in a while, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sure enough, that is what I said back when we first met...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So let's do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my hands are tied, so I decide to allow a
little indulgence, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This is the thing everyone's talking about!
Carrot Cornucopia!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's samples? Nice! Yes, please!
choice_data_list: Okay, after you've tried this one, we're—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrrrring! Rrrrring!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Perfect timing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You know I gots to invite my peeps if they're
nearby! That's a no-brainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, sorry for surprising you. I know it's really
sudden, so just let us know if it's too much
trouble...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No worries! It's fine! Now, let's start off with a selfie and then... a dance battle! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hello! I've come to hang out!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi, Jordan! ♪ I could use some help if you
want an extra shift!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sorry! It's my day off today! More
importantly, you've got that new item in, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I've had my eyes on it for sooo long! I have to get it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, is there another new one?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wooow, I am so buying it! Hold my bags, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we make it back to the academy, the
sun has already gone down.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm literally dyiiiinnng!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I can't even take another step... What's up with
me?
choice_data_list: You need to rest for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Phew... I was scared there for a sec. Going all out like this used to be nothing for me...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Is that why? You're kidding, right? That's crazy.
choice_data_list: You're not supposed to shop until you actually drop.
You're not supposed to shop until you actually drop.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon. I just wanna make the most of life, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to have fun like this when I'm an
adult.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
See! Thought so! Being an adult sounds like a
total drag.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you ever wanna blow off some
steam! That's my specialty!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ha, there it is. Adults like that are just, like... you
know? It's like...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Life's no fun if you live like that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... If you say so.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm gonna drag you around like this again
sometime. We'll call it an emotional anti-aging
treatment or whatever.
